name: njx-ui
description: Lightweight CSS component library — 25+ components, 9 themes, zero dependencies. ~40KB.

scripts.build: npm run build:css:full && npm run build:css:classless && npm run sync-version
scripts.build:css:full: lightningcss --minify --bundle css/style.css -o css/style.min.css && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const f='css/style.min.css';const h='/* njX UI v'+require('./package.json').version+' | MIT License | github.com/njbSaab/njx-css-ui */\n';fs.writeFileSync(f,h+fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8'));"
scripts.build:css:classless: lightningcss --minify --bundle css/classless.css -o css/classless.min.css && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const f='css/classless.min.css';const h='/* njX UI Classless v'+require('./package.json').version+' | MIT License | github.com/njbSaab/njx-css-ui */\n';fs.writeFileSync(f,h+fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8'));"
scripts.header: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const f='css/style.min.css';const h='/* njX UI v'+require('./package.json').version+' | MIT License | github.com/njbSaab/njx-css-ui */\n';fs.writeFileSync(f,h+fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8'));"

author: njbSaab
